Name: Tiling the Plane
Description: A library for tiling the Euclidean plane: a catalog of regular/semiregular tilings whose vertex-figure validity is derived from angle sums, plus a generative engine that places prototiles into a region and measures coverage, gaps, and overlaps.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: airtabletorulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Pull rulebook from Airtable (optional; edit tiling-the-plane-rulebook.json directly). [DISABLED: rulebook JSON is authoritative; re-enable only with explicit user consent]

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktopostgres
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate Postgres schema + functions + views + seed data from the rulebook.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: initdb
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Drop + recreate the local Postgres DB and run all NN[b]?-*.sql in lex order.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktoreactexplainerdag
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate the embedded React Explainer DAG module (clickable derivation graph for every calculated/lookup/aggregation field).

ProjectTranspilers.Name: httplocalhost4242postgrescalculatedtorulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Reverse spoke: refresh rulebook derived-field display copies from Postgres views after the destructive rebuild (raws verified, never written). [DISABLED: requires postgres-bootstrap/pull-from-postgres.sh to produce .pg-raw-data.json; not wired in this project. The rulebook JSON is authoritative, so the display-copy refresh is optional.]
